name: Code Modernization
description: Legacy-system modernization toolkit — discovery, dependency mapping, business-rule extraction, modernization brief, reimagine/transform, security harden. Ships 7 skills (modernize-assess|map|extract-rules|brief|reimagine|transform|harden) and 5 specialist subagents (legacy-analyst, business-rules-extractor, architecture-critic, security-auditor, test-engineer).
author: OpenComputer Contributors (port of Anthropic's code-modernization plugin)
